issues.title: Enemy dealt 12 dmg (86% of 14 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: On floor 1, encounter 1, turn 15 (seq 111), the enemy dealt 12 damage which is 86% of the player's 14 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 18 dmg (100% of 18 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: On floor 1, encounter 1, turn 17 (seq 119), the enemy dealt 18 damage which is 100% of the player's 18 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 1, encounter 1 (crystal_golem)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 1, encounter 1 against crystal_golem (common). Accuracy was 27% with 17 turns played. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.

issues.title: HP crashed from 63 to 14 in floor 1 encounter 1
issues.description: During floor 1, encounter 1, player HP dropped from 63 (79%) to 14 (18%). Going from >70% to <20% in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (80 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
